info.name: URL Shortner API
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the URL Shortner application.

## Authentication
All endpoints except `/api/register`, `/api/login`, and `/<code>` require a JWT token in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-token>
```

## Base URL
- Local: `http://127.0.0.1:5000`
- Production: Set `base_url` variable accordingly

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**Request Body:**
- `username` (string, required): 2-80 characters
- `email` (string, required): Valid email format
- `password` (string, required): At least 6 characters

**Response (201):**
```json
{
  "message": "User registered successfully",
  "token": "eyJ...",
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "username": "johndoe",
    "email": "john@example.com"
  }
}
```

**Errors:** 400 (validation), 409 (duplicate email), 500 (server error)

Authenticate with email and password.

**Request Body:**
- `email` (string, required)
- `password` (string, required)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "message": "Login successful",
  "token": "eyJ...",
  "user": {
    "id": 1,
    "username": "johndoe",
    "email": "john@example.com"
  }
}
```

**Errors:** 400 (missing fields), 401 (invalid credentials)

Create a shortened URL.

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (required)

**Request Body:**
- `url` (string, required): Must start with http:// or https://, max 2048 chars

**Response (201):**
```json
{
  "message": "URL shortened successfully",
  "url": {
    "id": 1,
    "user_id": 1,
    "original_url": "https://example.com/very/long/url/that/needs/shortening",
    "short_code": "aB3xYz",
    "short_url": "http://127.0.0.1:5000/aB3xYz",
    "clicks": 0,
    "created_at": "2026-06-15T14:30:00"
  }
}
```

**Errors:** 400 (invalid URL), 401 (no token), 500 (server error)

List all URLs created by the authenticated user, ordered newest first.

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (required)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "total": 2,
  "urls": [
    {
      "id": 2,
      "user_id": 1,
      "original_url": "https://example.com/page2",
      "short_code": "XyZ789",
      "short_url": "http://127.0.0.1:5000/XyZ789",
      "clicks": 5,
      "created_at": "2026-06-15T14:35:00"
    },
    {
      "id": 1,
      "user_id": 1,
      "original_url": "https://example.com/page1",
      "short_code": "aB3xYz",
      "short_url": "http://127.0.0.1:5000/aB3xYz",
      "clicks": 10,
      "created_at": "2026-06-15T14:30:00"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Errors:** 401 (no token), 404 (user not found)

Get detailed click analytics for the authenticated user's URLs.

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (required)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "total_urls": 5,
  "total_clicks": 100,
  "avg_clicks": 20,
  "most_clicked_count": 50,
  "top_urls": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "original_url": "https://example.com/popular",
      "short_code": "abc123",
      "short_url": "http://127.0.0.1:5000/abc123",
      "clicks": 50,
      "created_at": "2026-06-15T14:30:00"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Errors:** 401 (no token), 404 (user not found)

Follow a short URL to its original destination.

**Path Parameters:**
- `short_code` (string, required): The 6-character short code

**Response:** 302 Redirect to the original URL

**Errors:** 404 (short code not found)

Note: This endpoint does NOT require authentication.
